name: Danske Invest - Global Sustainable Future Akk
summary: Danske Invest - Global Sustainable Future Akk is an equity mutual fund launched and managed by Danske Capital AS. The fund invests in the public equity markets across the globe except Denmark. It was formerly known as Danske Invest - Verden Akk. Danske Invest - Global StockPicking Akkumulerende was formed on November 22, 2002 and is domiciled in Denmark. It was formerly known as Danske Invest - Global Sustainable Future Akk on June 6, 2013.
